race.comment: Most of these have decent claims. SOLID (7) was ridden colder last start and responded by working home well to get up for second over 1450m at Illawarra Grange. Gets a small gear change and should be ready to peak at the third run back. The hardest to beat will be CLANWILLIAM (1) who missed a maiden win by a whisker over 1400m here first-up. Unsuited dropping back to 1300m at Warwick Farm last time but was only beaten a couple of lengths. This looks the ideal scenario at the third run back. BRITISH GEM (10) has attacked the line with purpose for a couple of close thirds in shorter races to kick off this prep. Gets blinkers for the first time and a bit more ground on a roomier track is ideal. FLYING PARTY (3) made it four minor placings from as many career runs when runner-up to I Am Adonis over 1300m at Wyong recently. Will enjoy getting out to this distance for the first time. The promising SUR NOVA CENTAURI (8) is trialling well and looks ready to make a strong comeback.
